title: Frequently Asked Questions
intro: Quick answers to the questions we hear most often, organised by topic. If you cannot find what you are looking for, our team is one message away on info@flyair.lk or 0788 788 788.

sections.h: How do I book a flight on FlyAir?
sections.p:
Search your route and date from the home page, pick a fare, fill in passenger details exactly as on the passport, and pay. You will receive an airline reservation reference and an e-ticket by email within a few minutes of payment.

If you do not see a confirmation email within ten minutes, check your spam folder, then write to info@flyair.lk with the name and date of travel and we will resend it.

sections.h: Which payment methods can I use?
sections.p: We accept Visa, Mastercard and American Express credit and debit cards, bank transfer to our Sri Lankan accounts, and instalment plans with selected partner banks. A small card convenience fee applies (2% on Visa/Mastercard, 2.6% on American Express); bank transfer is fee-free.

sections.h: Can I change or cancel my booking?
sections.p: Eligible fares can be cancelled free of charge within 24 hours of booking — look for the "Free 24h cancellation" badge on the fare. Outside that window, change and refund rules are set by the airline and the fare brand: most discounted economy fares carry a change fee and may not be refundable, while flexible fares can usually be changed or refunded with smaller penalties.

sections.h: How do I get my boarding pass?
sections.p: Use the airline’s online check-in — most carriers open it between 48 hours and 1 hour before departure. Have your airline booking reference (PNR) and passenger surname ready. If you cannot complete online check-in, you can check in at the airport; some low-cost airlines charge a fee for airport check-in.

sections.h: My flight has been delayed or cancelled — what now?
sections.p: The operating airline manages re-accommodation, refunds and any compensation that may be due under its policy and applicable passenger-rights rules. Contact us with your booking reference and we will help you secure the best available alternative or start a refund request on your behalf.

Visa rules depend on your nationality, destination, and any transit countries on your route. We strongly recommend checking the official guidance from the destination’s government website before you book. Our visa services team (powered by travellers.lk) can help with document checklists and applications for popular destinations.

sections.h: Is my payment information safe with FlyAir?
sections.p: Yes. flyair.lk is served over HTTPS with TLS 1.2+; card payments are processed by a regulated, PCI-DSS-compliant gateway with 3-D Secure (OTP) verification; we do not store full card numbers on our own systems.

sections.h: Can I book for someone else?
sections.p: Yes. Enter the traveller’s details exactly as on their passport. By making the booking you confirm you have authority to share their information with the airline and to receive booking communications on their behalf.
Yes — groups of 10 or more travellers usually qualify for negotiated group fares. Write to info@flyair.lk with the route, dates and group size and our corporate desk will respond with options.

sections.h: What if I find a cheaper fare elsewhere?
sections.p: Tell us — send a screenshot of the same flight, date, fare brand and cabin to info@flyair.lk within 24 hours of your booking and we will check whether we can match it. Note that genuine fare differences usually reflect a different fare brand or hidden charges that we have already included in our displayed price.
